sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83198" key="pinakoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῐνᾰκο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n83198.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a tablet</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0097.tlg001:5:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.72</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
